<!-- Page Type: Productused -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.1 | SEO with Owls Claw (See Owls Claw) -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE} — {DESCRIPTION_USED_PRODUCT}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{DESCRIPTION_LENGTH_160_chars_max}">
    <link rel="canonical" href="{URL_CANONICAL}">
    
    <!-- Schema: UsedProduct or Offer -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Product",
      "name": "{TITLE}",
      "description": "{DESCRIPTION_USED_PRODUCT}",
      "brand": "{BRAND_NAME}",
      "offers": {
        "@type": "Offer",
        "priceCurrency": "EUR",
        "price": "{PRICE_CURRENCY_PRICE_USED}",
        "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
      },
      "condition": {
        "@type": "ConditionSpecification",
        "hasValue": "{CONDITION_LEVEL_USED}"
      }
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- HERO SECTION -->
    <header class="used-product-hero">
        <h1>{H1_TITLE_BRAND_PRODUCT_USED} — {USED_KEYWORDS}</h1>
        <p>{HERO_SUBHEADINE_CONDITION_DISCLOSURE} — Premium refurbished condition</p>
        <span class="price-tag">{DISPLAY_PRICE_EUR_USED}_ (Save ~{SAVE_PERCENTAGE}% vs new)</span>
    </header>

    <!-- CONDITION REPORT H2 -->
    <section class="condition-report">
        <h2>{H2_OVERVIEW_CONDITION_DISCLOSURE}</h2>
        <p>{CONDITION_CONTENT_300_CHARS_MAX} — Fully inspected, tested, and certified</p>
        <ul class="inspection-bullets">
            <li>{INSPECTION_ITEM_1_FUNCTIONALITY_TESTED}</li>
            <li>{INSPECTION_ITEM_2_WEAR_AND_TEAR_ASSESSMENT}</li>
            <li>{INSPECTION_ITEM_3_FUNCTIONALITY_TESTED}</li>
        </ul>
    </section>

    <!-- FEATURE-DIFFERENCE H3 Section -->
    <section class="feature-difference">
        <h3>{H3_FEATURE_COMPARISON_NEW_vs_USED}</h3>
        <dl class="diff-list">
            <dt>{DIFF_1_FUNCTIONALITY_PRESERVED}</dt><dd>{DIFF_1_VALUE_PROPOSITION}</dd>
            <dt>{DIFF_2_COST_SAVINGS_PERCENTAGE}</dt><dd>{DIFF_2_BEST_FOR_PRICE_SENSITIVE_BUYERS}</dd>
            <dt>{DIFF_3_ECO_FRIENDLY_REUSE_FACTOR}</dt><dd>{DIFF_3_PLAGUE_IMACT_REDUCTION}</dd>
        </dl>
    </section>

    <!-- DETAILED CONDITION H4 Section -->
    <section class="condition-detailed">
        <h4>{H4_COSMETIC_CONDITION_REPORT_DETAIL}</h4>
        <p>{COSTET_CONDITION_DETAIL_200_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        <ul class="cosmetic-bullets">
            <li>{COSMETIC_ITEM_1_NO_SCRAVES_MARKS}</li>
            <li>{COSMETIC_ITEM_2_LIGHTLY_USED_BUT_FUNCTIONAL}</li>
        </ul>
    </section>

    <!-- WARRANTY CTA H5 Section -->
    <section class="warranty-cta">
        <h5>{H5_PURCHASE_WITH_CONFIDENCE_WARRANTY}</h5>
        <ul class="warranty-bullets">
            <li>{WARRANTY_1_FULL_FUNCTIONALITY_GUARANTEE}</li>
            <li>{WARRANTY_2_30_DAYS_RETURN_POLICY}</li>
            <li>{WARRANTY_3_TECHNICAL_SUPPORT_AVAILABLE}</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="{PURCHASE_LINK_USED}" class="buy-button-used">{BUY_BUTTON_TEXT_ADD_TO_CART_USED}</a>
    </section>

    <!-- INTERNAL LINKING H6s -->
    <footer class="related-used-products">
        <h6><a href="/similar-used-product-page">{RELATED_USED_PRODUCT_TITLE}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="/why-buy-used-over-new">{COMPARISON_BUYING_USED_PAGE}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="/condition-certification-process">{CERTIFICATION_PROCESS_LINK}</a></h6>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Change any {PLACEHOLDER} text directly in this file before generation -->
<!-- Used products need clear condition disclosures and value proposition vs new pricing! -->
